title: Color System in Design System
content: # Color System Systems Directories Components Articles Blueprints Guides Glossary Accessibility Component lifecycle Component overview Component status Data visualization Elevation Figma Icons Illustrations International Design Layout Motion Patterns Repository Responsive Spacing States Storybook Styles Theming Tokens Typography Voice and Tone Subscribe Color System is well-defined set of colors that are used consistently across a Design System, Component library, and Style Guide. It provides a standardized palette of colors that are carefully chosen to ensure visual harmony and brand consistency. Color System includes primary, secondary, and accent colors, as well as variations for different states and contexts. It enables teams to create visually appealing and accessible interfaces by maintaining proper color contrast and readability. By implementing Color System, design teams can streamline the design process, foster a unified visual identity, and enhance the overall user experience through cohesive and aesthetically pleasing color choices. in Design Systems Adobe Spectrum Alaska Airlines Auro Amazon Cloudscape Apple HIG Atlassian Design System Audi Basis Biings Brainly Pencil Carrefour Marcel Cash App CBRE Build Blocks Cisco Momentum Design Datadog Druids Dell Docplanner Watson eBay Evo Elastic Esri Calcite General Electric Edison Github Primer GitLab Pajamas Google Material Design GOV.UK Gusto Workbench Helly Hansen IBM Carbon Ideagen Helix INPS Sirio Kajabi Sage Kiwicom Orbit Lemon Squeezy Wedges Line LocalTapiola Duet Michelin Microsoft Fluent 2 Monday.com Vibe MongoDB LeafyGreen Motorway Highway Code Mozilla Protocol Nordhealth Ontario Orange Palantir Blueprint Pinterest Gestalt Pluralsight Red Hat PatternFly Rei Cedar Salesforce Lightning Samsung One UI Seek Braid Segment Evergreen ServiceNow Horizon Shopify Polaris Skoda Flow Sprout Social Seeds Sunrise Solar Teamleader Ahoy Thumbtack Thumbprint Twilio Paste U.S. Web UAE Uber Base Vercel Geist Visa Washington Post Wikimedia Codex Wise Wonderflow Wanda Workday Canvas WorkOS Radix Zendesk Garden
